40.2.1 - General Principles Governing Reasonable and Necessary 
Physical Therapy, Speech-Language Pathology Services, and 
Occupational Therapy 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The service of a physical therapist, speech-language pathologist, or occupational therapist 
is a skilled therapy service if the inherent complexity of the service is such that it can be
